<title>Analyzing Project Files</title>
<thinking>
The file structure suggests a Minecraft datapack combined with an agent-based system. I see `pack.mcmeta`, `gen.mcfunction`, and a `data/minecraft/` directory, which are standard for Minecraft. There is also a `.agent/` directory containing extensive documentation and configuration for an agent. I'll read `pack.mcmeta` and `.agent/INDEX.md` to get a better overview.
</thinking>
